case_title: RACHEL MCDONALD VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCDONALD, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, RACHEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, RACHEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF RACHEL MCDONALD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
